race.comment: LA BELLA ROSA (10) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start when she got a long way back to finish seventh over 1400m at Kembla Grange. Tackles a more suitable race this time and perfectly placed to score. DARKEN (2) was below his best last time out when eighth over 1600m at Albury. Back in trip with the claim and has solid top-three prospects. AMPLE TIME (6) snagged back early and chipped away late with an even sixth over 1600m at Wagga. Kept fresh and will prove hard to hold out over this trip. NAGADEC (1) capable mare on the quick back-up. Warmed up late when fifth over 1400m at then Sapphire Coast in BM66 class. Solid top-three player.
